title: Portable Document Packages
content_html:
Portable Document Packages

Explore a later integrated Docs Viewer package that preserves canonical document source and its owned dependencies when rendered-content exchange is insufficient.

Feature Documents

  • Full Document Export Delivery — proposed source-faithful, export-only package work.

The shipped Share Document Packages boundary remains authoritative. No document-full-source profile is enabled. This feature does not imply that source-faithful packages support return import; any future return path needs its own reviewed validation and apply boundary.
